mapper.sql: pause_id AS pauseId, user_id AS userId, card_order_id AS cardOrderId, pause_type AS pauseType, pause_rule_id AS pauseRuleId, amount, pay_order_no AS payOrderNo, transaction_id AS transactionId, pay_time AS payTime, pause_days AS pauseDays, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, cancel_time AS cancelTime, actual_days AS actualDays, status, created_date AS createdDate
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO card_pause_record
user_id, card_order_id, pause_type, pause_rule_id, amount, pay_order_no, transaction_id, pay_time, pause_days, start_time, end_time, cancel_time, actual_days, status,
#{userId}, #{cardOrderId}, #{pauseType}, #{pauseRuleId}, #{amount}, #{payOrderNo}, #{transactionId}, #{payTime}, #{pauseDays}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{actualDays}, #{status},
mapper.select: SELECT cardOrderId, userId, cardId, status, validityDate FROM card_order WHERE cardOrderId = #{cardOrderId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT cardNature FROM fit_card WHERE fitCardId = #{cardId}
SELECT MAX(start_time) FROM card_pause_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND pause_type = 0 AND status IN (0, 1, 2)
SELECT start_time FROM card_pause_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND pause_type = 0 AND status IN (0, 1, 2) ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE card_pause_record SET status = 3 WHERE card_order_id = #{cardOrderId} AND status = 10
mapper.select: SELECT FROM card_pause_record WHERE pay_order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM card_pause_record WHERE pay_order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM card_pause_record WHERE pause_id = #{pauseId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE card_pause_record SET status = 0, start_time = #{now}, end_time = #{endTime}, pay_time = #{now}, transaction_id = #{transactionId} WHERE pause_id = #{pauseId} AND status IN (10, 3)
UPDATE card_pause_record SET status = 2, pay_time = #{now}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, cancel_time = #{now}, actual_days = 0 WHERE pause_id = #{pauseId} AND status IN (10, 3)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM card_pause_record WHERE pause_id = #{pauseId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE card_pause_record SET end_time = #{endTime}, pause_days = #{pauseDays}, status = 1 WHERE pause_id = #{pauseId} AND status = 0

UPDATE card_order co LEFT JOIN device d ON d.deviceId = co.deviceId SET co.validityDate = DATE_ADD(co.validityDate, INTERVAL #{days} DAY), d.validityDate = DATE_ADD(d.validityDate, INTERVAL #{days} DAY) WHERE co.cardOrderId = #{cardOrderId}

UPDATE card_order co LEFT JOIN device d ON d.deviceId = co.deviceId SET co.validityDate = DATE_SUB(co.validityDate, INTERVAL #{days} DAY), d.validityDate = DATE_SUB(d.validityDate, INTERVAL #{days} DAY) WHERE co.cardOrderId = #{cardOrderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM card_pause_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 AND start_time <= NOW() AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time > NOW())
